TEXT.source: Atayal Wikipedia, article: 泰雅族諺語
TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: 作者:Omi Wilang , . qqnxan tayal sraral ga, ini piyang muluw, ana ungat llamuw na nniqan, blaq na pinkusan ki krahu ngasal ru llgan na Torak ,ana ga qutux qutux cinqalang ru ssquliq na tayal ga, s'unan pinnqsa ru pssiy balay inlungan qu qqnxan na tayal. ke na tayal thoyay lemuqi singsuw kinlokah hi ru inlungan ki insuna ssquliq na tayal, spuwah snbin lkesan sinlungan na k'ke, singsuw ru mlahang sinlokah kwara he na Tayal.
S.PHON: **:omi wilaŋ , . qqnxan tajal s~ɕraral ɣa, ini pijaŋ muluw, ana uŋat llamuw na nniqan, βlaq na pinkus~ɕan ki kraħu ŋas~ɕal ru llɣan na torak ,ana ɣa qutux qutux ʦ~ʨinqalaŋ ru s~ɕs~ɕquliq na tajal ɣa, s~ɕʔunan pinnqs~ɕa ru ps~ɕs~ɕij βalaj inluŋan qu qqnxan na tajal. ke na tajal tħojaj lemuqi s~ɕiŋs~ɕuw kinlokaħ ħi ru inluŋan ki ins~ɕuna s~ɕs~ɕquliq na tajal, s~ɕpuwaħ s~ɕnβin lkes~ɕan s~ɕinluŋan na kʔke, s~ɕiŋs~ɕuw ru mlaħaŋ s~ɕinlokaħ kwara ħe na tajal.
S.FORM: 作者:Omi Wilang , . qqnxan tayal sraral ga, ini piyang muluw, ana ungat llamuw na nniqan, blaq na pinkusan ki krahu ngasal ru llgan na Torak ,ana ga qutux qutux cinqalang ru ssquliq na tayal ga, s'unan pinnqsa ru pssiy balay inlungan qu qqnxan na tayal. ke na tayal thoyay lemuqi singsuw kinlokah hi ru inlungan ki insuna ssquliq na tayal, spuwah snbin lkesan sinlungan na k'ke, singsuw ru mlahang sinlokah kwara he na Tayal.
S.PHON: **:omi wilaŋ , . qqnxan tajal s~ɕraral ɣa, ini pijaŋ muluw, ana uŋat llamuw na nniqan, βlaq na pinkus~ɕan ki kraħu ŋas~ɕal ru llɣan na torak ,ana ɣa qutux qutux ʦ~ʨinqalaŋ ru s~ɕs~ɕquliq na tajal ɣa, s~ɕʔunan pinnqs~ɕa ru ps~ɕs~ɕij βalaj inluŋan qu qqnxan na tajal. ke na tajal tħojaj lemuqi s~ɕiŋs~ɕuw kinlokaħ ħi ru inluŋan ki ins~ɕuna s~ɕs~ɕquliq na tajal, s~ɕpuwaħ s~ɕnβin lkes~ɕan s~ɕinluŋan na kʔke, s~ɕiŋs~ɕuw ru mlaħaŋ s~ɕinlokaħ kwara ħe na tajal.
